overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a blue coat and cowboy hat exploring the dimly lit interior of a rustic log cabin, interacting with objects, and exiting into a bright snowy mountain village with scattered wooden cabins and snow-covered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic log cabin interior with wooden furniture and stone fireplace

events.description: character turns right and walks through wooden doorway into adjacent room
character approaches wooden bed and turns to examine the corner of the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the front rooms of the cabin, examining rustic furnishings and moving between connected wooden rooms

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving unit against the wall with various items
wooden doorway with rough timber frame connecting rooms
small wooden side table with items on top
old-fashioned wooden spinning wheel leaning against wall
window with yellowed curtains letting in diffused daylight
wooden bed frame with plaid blanket and pillow
small blue wooden dresser with drawers

segments.scene_description: The character explores the front rooms of a rustic log cabin, moving through wooden doorways and examining the sparse furnishings including a spinning wheel and wooden bed. Natural light filters through curtained windows, illuminating the rough wooden plank walls and floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: back room of log cabin with bed and storage furniture near exit

events.description: character interacts with wooden drawer, search prompt appears on screen
character turns and walks toward the exit door at the end of the cabin
character opens wooden door revealing bright snowy exterior

agents.ego_description: searching a wooden drawer in the back room, then turning and walking toward the cabin exit

entered.detail: tall empty wooden bookcase with multiple shelves
wooden exit door with bright light visible through gaps at bottom
stone fireplace with wooden mantle and chimney
wooden barrel with metal bands near the wall

segments.scene_description: In the back room of the cabin, the character searches a wooden drawer near the bed, then turns and walks toward the exit door. The room contains a stone fireplace, empty bookcase, and wooden barrel. At the end of the segment, the character opens the door, revealing the bright snowy exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain village with scattered log cabins

events.description: exiting the dark cabin into bright sunlight reflecting off snow causes exposure adjustment
character transitions from walking to running through the deep snow

agents.ego_description: walking and then running through deep snow, exploring the abandoned snowy village with log cabins and snow-covered trees

entered.detail: deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints
wooden log cabin with snow-covered gabled roof
tall pine trees heavily covered in snow
snow-capped mountains visible in the background
simple wooden fence partially buried in snow
dilapidated wooden cabin with snow on roof

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cabin into a bright, snow-covered mountain village. Sunlight reflects off the deep snow covering the ground and rooftops. The character moves through the snow past wooden fences and abandoned log cabins, with snow-covered pine trees and mountain peaks visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, rustic interior of a log cabin out into a brilliant, snow-covered mountain village. It begins by tracking the character through the front rooms, passing a spinning wheel and wooden bed as soft light filters through curtained windows. As the character moves deeper into the back room to search a wooden drawer, the camera glides past a stone fireplace and an empty bookcase before turning toward the exit. The scene then shifts abruptly from the shadowed wooden interior to a blinding white exterior as the character opens the door and steps outside. Finally, the view expands across a sunlit landscape of deep snow, moving past wooden fences and abandoned cabins toward distant pine trees and towering mountain peaks.
